## Enhancement summary

What aspect of the AI system should be improved?

## Area

- [ ] Prompt engineering (system prompt, output format)
- [ ] Response validation (Zod schemas)
- [ ] Swarm reasoning logic
- [ ] Mock intelligence reports
- [ ] Rate limiting or abuse prevention
- [ ] Backend proxy architecture
- [ ] AI provider integration
- [ ] New analysis type or insight category

## Current behavior

How does the AI system behave today?

## Desired behavior

How should it behave after this change?

## Security considerations

Does this change touch anything security-sensitive? (prompt injection surface, rate limiting, key handling)

## Prompt changes

If proposing prompt changes, include the proposed system or user prompt modifications.
